//: Deno-only toolchain: format, type-check and test with Deno's own bundled TypeScript. No npm, no registry installs. Browser code stays .js+JSDoc (no build step); dev tooling is .ts. tests/ holds real tests; scripts/ holds the CLI tools.

tasks.check: deno check shared/globals.d.ts shared/plan-core.js shared/plan.js shared/data.js shared/pop.js scripts/lib.ts scripts/validate.ts scripts/stamp-sw.ts scripts/syntax-check.ts scripts/split-audio.ts tests/plan-core.test.ts
tasks.all: deno task fmt:check && deno task syntax && deno task validate && deno task test && deno task check
